scripts.build: make -C ../simulation-engine build && cp -r ../simulation-engine/dist/* ./ && mkdir -p vendor/leaflet vendor/pmtiles && cp node_modules/leaflet/dist/leaflet.js vendor/leaflet/ && cp node_modules/leaflet/dist/leaflet.css vendor/leaflet/ && cp -r node_modules/leaflet/dist/images vendor/leaflet/ && cp node_modules/pmtiles/dist/pmtiles.js vendor/pmtiles/
